Flow.description: Copy relevant information to Additional Info field to be synced with Netsuite

formulas.name: F_AdditionalInfoNetsuite
formulas.expression:
{!$Record.Additional_Info__c} & BR() & IF(NOT(ISBLANK({!$Record.Cloud_Site_Name__c} )), "Cloud Site: ", "") & IF(NOT(ISBLANK({!$Record.Cloud_Site_Name__c} )), {!$Record.Cloud_Site_Name__c} , "")
& IF(NOT(ISBLANK({!$Record.Cloud_Site_Name__c} )), BR() , "") &
IF(NOT(ISBLANK({!$Record.SEN__c})), "SEN: ", "") & IF(NOT(ISBLANK({!$Record.SEN__c})), {!$Record.SEN__c} , "")
& IF(NOT(ISBLANK({!$Record.SEN__c})), BR() , "") &
IF(NOT(ISBLANK({!$Record.Entitlement_Number__c})), "Entitlement Number: ", "") & IF(NOT(ISBLANK({!$Record.Entitlement_Number__c})), {!$Record.Entitlement_Number__c}, "")
& IF(NOT(ISBLANK({!$Record.Entitlement_Number__c})), BR(), "")&
IF(NOT(ISBLANK(TEXT({!$Record.User_Count__c}))), "User Count: ", "") & IF(AND(NOT(ISBLANK(TEXT({!$Record.User_Count__c}))), {!$Record.User_Count__c} = 987654321), "Unlimited", IF(NOT(ISBLANK(TEXT({!$Record.User_Count__c}))), TEXT({!$Record.User_Count__c}), ""))
& IF(NOT(ISBLANK({!$Record.User_Count__c})), BR(), "")&
IF(NOT(ISBLANK({!$Record.License_Start_date__c})), "Start Date: ", "") & IF(NOT(ISBLANK({!$Record.License_Start_Date__c})), {!$Record.Start_Date_Text__c}, "")
& IF(NOT(ISBLANK({!$Record.License_Start_Date__c})), BR(), "")&
IF(NOT(ISBLANK({!$Record.License_End_Date__c})), "End Date: ", "") & IF(NOT(ISBLANK({!$Record.License_End_Date__c})), {!$Record.End_Date_Text__c}, "")
& IF(NOT(ISBLANK({!$Record.License_End_Date__c})), BR(), "")&
IF(AND(ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Opportunity.Account.CV_Subsidiary__c}, "CH") ,NOT(ISBLANK({!$Record.List_Price_Inc_Licence_Type__c}))), "List Price: ", "") & IF(AND(ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Opportunity.Account.CV_Subsidiary__c}, "CH") ,NOT(ISBLANK({!$Record.List_Price_Inc_Licence_Type__c}))) , TEXT({!$Record.List_Price_Inc_Licence_Type__c}),"") & IF(AND(ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Opportunity.Account.CV_Subsidiary__c}, "CH") ,NOT(ISBLANK({!$Record.List_Price_Inc_Licence_Type__c}))), " ", "") & IF(AND(ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Opportunity.Account.CV_Subsidiary__c}, "CH") ,NOT(ISBLANK({!$Record.List_Price_Inc_Licence_Type__c}))), TEXT({!$Record.CurrencyIsoCode}), "")
& IF(NOT(ISBLANK({!$Record.List_Price_Inc_Licence_Type__c})), BR(), "")&
IF(AND(ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Opportunity.Account.CV_Subsidiary__c}, "CH"),NOT(ISBLANK({!$Record.Discount__c}))), "Discount: ", "") & IF(AND(ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Opportunity.Account.CV_Subsidiary__c}, "CH"),NOT(ISBLANK({!$Record.Discount__c}))) , TEXT({!$Record.Discount__c}),"") & IF(AND(ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Opportunity.Account.CV_Subsidiary__c}, "CH"),NOT(ISBLANK({!$Record.Discount__c}))) ," %","")

Flow.label: Additional Info Netsuite
